creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
If I compile zsh statically (ZSH_STATIC), open up a shell, and try to tab complete (specifically I find it with devices) -- mount /dev/[TAB] I receive this error several times:

failed to load module zsh/regex

How-To-Repeat: Compile zsh with the STATIC knob and try to tab complete a device with the mount command.
